channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2147 HONEYWELL AVENUE, Apt 4D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE PROPERLY REPAIR WITH SIMILAR MATERIAL THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE CERAMIC TILES AT SOUTH WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 4D, 4th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2147 HONEYWELL AVENUE, Apt 4D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE REPAIR THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE PLASTERED SURFACES AND PAINT IN A UNIFORM COLOR AT NORTH WALL IN THE FOYER LOCATED AT APT 4D, 4th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 670 RIVERSIDE DRIVE, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE LATCH AT FIRE DOOR AT PUBLIC HALL, 6th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 37-80 64 STREET, Apt C41, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) BASEBOARD AT EAST WALL, 1st WINDOW FRAME FROM NORTH AT EAST WALL, 2nd WINDOW FRAME FROM NORTH AT EAST WALL IN THE 2nd ROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT C41, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM EA

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 37-80 64 STREET, Apt C41, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD-PAINT THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE AND EITHER TESTED INCONCLUSIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AT 0.5MG/CM2 OR TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT ON A METAL OR CERAMIC SUBSTRATE AS SET FORTH IN (28 RCNY §11-07(b)) USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(b)(2). EAST WALL IN THE PRIVATE HALLWAY LOCATED AT APT C41, 4th STORY, 1s

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 608 WEST 139 STREET, Apt 2B, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7 ADM CODE: CORRECT FAILURE TO PROVIDE TO THE DEPARTMENT WITHIN 45 DAYS OF DEMAND ALL RECORDS REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY OWNER PURSUANT TO LOCAL LAW 1 OF 2004 RELATED TO LEAD-BASED PAINT NOTICES, INSPECTIONS AND REMEDIATION/ABATEMENT ACTIVITIES.

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 608 WEST 139 STREET, Apt 2B, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.4 ADM CODE- CORRECT FAILURE TO NOTIFY OCCUPANTS AND/OR TO INVESTIGATE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARDS.

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1560 GRAND CONCOURSE, Apt 319, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... APPROX 10 SQFT AT WEST WALL AND 6 SQFT AT NORTH WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 319, 3rd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 16013086 ISSUED 31-MAY-23 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 592 UNION AVENUE, Apt 4C, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... APPROX 10 SQFT AT THE NORTH WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 4C, 5th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 16621676 ISSUED 25-JAN-24 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 800 EAST 180 STREET, Apt 6K, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10 SQ FT AT CEILING IN THE 2nd BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 6K UPPER LEVEL, 6th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH , SECTION ''CENTER'' ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18054268 ISSUED 23-JUN-25 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 955 EVERGREEN AVENUE, Apt 802, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... NOT LESS THAN 20 SQUARE FEET, ON THE WALLS AND CEILING IN THE 1st BATHROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT 802, 8th STORY, 4th APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''North'' ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18540826 ISSUED 30-DEC-25 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 955 EVERGREEN AVENUE, Apt 802, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... AT ALL WALLS AND CEILING, IN THE 2nd BATHROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT 802, 8th STORY, 4th APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''North'' ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18540830 ISSUED 30-DEC-25 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 170 RIVERDALE AVENUE, Apt C, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10SQ FEET AT CEILING AND WEST WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT C, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18705602 ISSUED 12-MAR-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).
